name: Board
description: CRUD operations on the task board — list, get, create, update tasks.

tools.name: knowledge-board.listTasks
tools.description: List tasks on the board. Optional filters: status, project. Signature: board.listTasks({ status?: string, project?: string }). Returns compact summary (id, title, status) for each task.

status.description: Filter by workflow status: TODO, IN_PROGRESS, IN_REVIEW, DONE.

tools.name: knowledge-board.getTask
tools.description: Get full details of a task by ID or name. Signature: board.getTask({ task: string }). Returns all task fields.

task.description: Task ID or name (title substring match).

tools.name: knowledge-board.createTask
tools.description: Create a new task on the board. Signature: board.createTask({ title: string, description?: string, project?: string }). Returns the created task.

tools.name: knowledge-board.updateTask
tools.description: Update task fields. Signature: board.updateTask({ task: string, updates: object }). Updates by ID or name lookup.

task.description: Task ID or name (title substring match).

updates.description: Fields to update (e.g. { workflowStatus: 'DONE', agentState: 'IDLE', description: '...' }).
